title: The Stone's Polarity
description: The golem has been tested with 4 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing8: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
  ing7: chest=✓ ears=✗  →  chest_only
  ing3: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to B+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
